expectations.text: Organizes output into the 5 canonical buckets (pain points, trigger moments, objections, transformations, standout language)
expectations.evidence: Organized by Product-Level Analysis/Cross-Product Patterns/Recommendations — not the 5 canonical buckets

expectations.text: References scoring reviews 1-5 for quality before analysis
expectations.evidence: No 1-5 scoring; only broad sentiment labels like 'Strongly Positive' or 'Mixed'

expectations.text: Surfaces actual quotes from reviews (not just summary)
expectations.evidence: Pulls quotes 'settles my nerves', 'genuinely cozy', 'too piney', 'weekend in the mountains'

expectations.text: Output is separated/grouped by product (Hearth vs Evergreen)
expectations.evidence: Two sub-sections: Hearth Candle (3 reviews) and Evergreen Diffuser (4 reviews) with independent analyses

expectations.text: Surfaces distinct insights per product (not merged analysis)
expectations.evidence: Hearth ritual/pre-call use case; Evergreen fade rate and piney scent issues — distinct per product

expectations.text: Captures specific objections (scent fades, too piney, price)
expectations.evidence: Names all three: scent fade (~1 week), 'too piney' return, $38 price friction
